goal_results.evidence: e2e/agents/droid.go:202-207 — bare time.Sleep(2*time.Second) replaced with select{case <-ctx.Done(): ... case <-time.After(2*time.Second):}. Test gates G1 (no bare sleep) and G2 (context-aware pattern) both PASS.
e2e/agents/tmux.go:165-167 — error branch changed from 'return false' to 'return true' with explanatory comment. Test gate G3 (TMUX_DEAD_ON_ERROR) PASS.

e2e/testutil/repo.go:167-171 — string concat replaced with json.Marshal(agents.DefaultDroidModel()) + error handling (if err != nil { return fmt.Errorf(...) }). Test gates G4 (marshal call), G5 (no string concat), G6 (error handled) all PASS.

judge_notes: All 3 core goals met exactly as specified. Agent's patch matches the oracle approach precisely: context-aware select in StartSession, return true on tmux error in IsPaneDead, and json.Marshal with error handling in mergeDroidCustomModels. test.sh confirms final reward=1.0 with all 6 F2P gates passing. Score = 0.34 + 0.33 + 0.33 = 1.00.
